name: Gilmer National Bank, Gilmer, Texas
description_short: Gilmer National Bank is a community bank in Gilmer, Texas offering checking, savings, debit cards, direct deposit, and mortgage/agriculture loans with branches in Gilmer and Longview.
description_long:
Gilmer National Bank is a locally-rooted community bank headquartered in Gilmer, Texas, with a second branch in Longview. The bank operates under OCC supervision and maintains a traditional retail banking model focused on serving the local community. The institution provides standard consumer and commercial banking services including deposit accounts, payment processing, and lending products.

The bank's service offerings include checking and savings accounts (with a current savings APY of 3.31% as of October 28, 2025, with $50 minimum opening deposit), MasterCard debit cards, online banking with bill pay (iPay Bill Pay-e Plus), direct deposit setup, check and money order ordering, and specialized lending in agriculture and mortgages. They have recently added support for digital wallet payments including Google Pay and Apple Pay. The bank operates a motor bank drive-through at both locations for extended hours convenience.

Gilmer National Bank distinguishes itself through competitive savings rates (3.31% APY), personalized service with direct contact to named loan officers (such as MLO Felecia Hux for mortgage services), and commitment to fraud prevention education. The bank actively communicates security best practices to customers and maintains strict policies against requesting sensitive information. They also updated their funds availability policy effective July 1, 2025, to increase thresholds from $225/$5,525 to $275/$6,725.

As a smaller community bank, Gilmer National Bank is best suited for customers prioritizing local relationships and personalized service over extensive product breadth. However, the bank's limited branch network (two locations in East Texas) and lack of information about investment products, wealth management, or business banking services may limit appeal for customers seeking comprehensive financial services or those outside their service area. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Checking accounts with MasterCard debit cards
Savings accounts with competitive APY (3.31% as of October 28, 2025)
Online banking platform with 24-hour account access
Bill pay service (iPay Bill Pay-e Plus)
Official check and money order services
Mortgage loans with named MLO officer
Digital wallet support (Google Pay and Apple Play)
Debit card fraud monitoring and replacement services
pros: Competitive savings account APY of 3.31% (as of October 28, 2025) with only $50 minimum deposit
Extended motor bank drive-through hours (8 a.m. - 6 p.m. weekdays in Gilmer; 8 a.m. - 5 p.m. in Longview)
MasterCard debit card included with checking accounts at no mention of fees
Recently added Google Pay and Apple Pay support for digital wallet customers
Named loan officers for mortgage services (MLO Felecia Hux #416532) providing personalized contact
Specialized agriculture and mortgage lending products for community needs
24-hour online banking platform with bill pay functionality and transaction history access
cons: Very limited branch network (only 2 locations in East Texas) restricts accessibility for non-local customers
No information provided about investment products, wealth management, or investment services
Website does not specify APY or terms for checking accounts or money market accounts
Limited business banking or commercial services details provided
Savings rate disclaimer notes APY is subject to change after account opening with potential for reduction
best_for: East Texas residents (Gilmer/Longview area) seeking personalized community banking relationships
Agricultural business owners needing specialized farm lending products and local expertise
Savers looking for competitive deposit rates with minimal account opening requirements ($50 minimum)
diagnosis: Gilmer National Bank is best for customers in the Gilmer or Longview, Texas area who value personalized community banking, competitive savings rates, and direct relationships with loan officers. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank's two-branch footprint makes it impractical for customers outside East Texas, and it does not appear to offer online account opening or serve customers nationally.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
